testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该找到自然排名
AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该找到广告排名
testcase.system-out: 找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：found, 自然页：1, 广告页：1
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 'found' to be 'ad_only' // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- ad_only + found
❯ tests/integration/crawler/amazonCrawler.test.ts:137:29

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该同时找到自然排名和广告排名
testcase.system-out: 找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：found, 自然页：1, 广告页：1
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be 2 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 2 + 1
❯ tests/integration/crawler/amazonCrawler.test.ts:157:38

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该返回未找到当 ASIN 不在搜索结果中
AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该处理网络错误并重试
testcase.system-err: 爬取失败 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 页码：1 { code: [32m'ETIMEDOUT'[39m, message: [32m'timeout'[39m }

failure.message: expected "spy" to be called 3 times, but got 1 times

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected "spy" to be called 3 times, but got 1 times ❯ tests/integration/crawler/amazonCrawler.test.ts:191:23

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该处理验证码页面

检测到错误页面，重试。关键词：wireless earbuds, 页码：1
检测到错误页面，重试。关键词：wireless earbuds, 页码：2

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该处理请求超时
testcase.system-err: 爬取失败 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 页码：1 { code: [32m'ETIMEDOUT'[39m, message: [32m'timeout'[39m }

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该处理 500 服务器错误
testcase.system-err: 爬取失败 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 页码：1 { response: { status: [33m500[39m }, message: [32m'Internal Server Error'[39m }

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > searchAndExtractRank > 应该支持不同亚马逊站点
testcase.system-out:
找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：organic_only, 自然页：1, 广告页：null
找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：organic_only, 自然页：1, 广告页：null
找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：organic_only, 自然页：1, 广告页：null
找到排名 - 关键词：wireless earbuds, 状态：organic_only, 自然页：1, 广告页：null

testcase.name: AmazonCrawler Integration > pause/resume > 应该清除暂停状态
